title: isREF, which is not SPARQL in generated query when doing SERVICE with SERVICE clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE compounds (id INT PRIMARY KEY, chebi_compound VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, score DOUBLE NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255), similaritySearch VARCHAR(255), cutoff DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO compounds (id, chebi_compound, score, name, similaritySearch, cutoff) VALUES (1, 'CHEBI:12345', 0.85, 'Compound A', 'OC1OCC=C2OC(=O)C=C12', 0.8);
INSERT INTO compounds (id, chebi_compound, score, name, similaritySearch, cutoff) VALUES (2, 'CHEBI:67890', NULL, 'Compound B', 'OC1OCC=C2OC(=O)C=C12', 0.5);
SELECT * FROM compounds WHERE score IS NOT NULL AND cutoff > 0.7;
UPDATE compounds SET score = score * 1.1 WHERE chebi_compound = 'CHEBI:12345';
